news.t: IShares MSCI KLD 400 Social Rated Best Among Top US Broad Market Smart Beta ETFs
ESG Investing Boom Is Bullish For Cleantech
Sustainable investing is taking Wall Street by storm—but there's plenty of room for growth in ETFs

holdings.infoBox: DSI is an equity ETF with a total of 407 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 14.00%, Microsoft at 8.05%, Alphabet at 6.14%, Alphabet at 4.84%, and Tesla at 3.30%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG MSCI KLD 400 ETF (DSI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI KLD 400 Social index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of 400 US companies deemed to have positive environmental, social, and governance characteristics, as determined by MSCI. DSI was launched on Nov 14, 2006 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Sustainable investing is taking Wall Street by storm—but there's plenty of room for growth in ETFs
data.text: The ETF community has quickly come to embrace ESG as the hot new investing theme in the business.
